label: Content credentials, signing & provenance

node.label: Content credentials, signing & provenance
node.definition: Content provenance records origin, transformations, model or tool identity, and integrity metadata through manifests, attestations, or verifiable logs.
node.why_it_matters: It supports auditable lineage even when statistical AI detection is unreliable or content passes through multiple tools.
limitations: Metadata can be stripped, adoption is uneven, and provenance establishes origin rather than truth or safety.

dependencies.rationale: Content credentials, signing & provenance measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Provenance, citations & evidence tracking.
Content credentials, signing & provenance measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Privacy, governance, licensing & audit.
Content credentials, signing & provenance measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Information theory.
